posts_within_12h_detected.text: Hi all, Is the surge a big improvement on the Spitfire840 for bump and jump winging...
Image-only post (board photos). Embedded listing from John lucas efoil.
Didn’t need it but had a bad case of FOMO... Integrated mast is 🔥🔥🔥

notable_embedded_content.text: AK Phazer 90L learner wing/parawing board for riders ~80kg or less; minor paint wear noted.

product_intel: Surge 830 repeatedly framed as direct SF840 replacement for bump/jump winging.
Counter-signal: one rider reports SF840->Surge830 reduced lift/drive in waves despite lower drag.
Integrated mast generates strong positive sentiment (FOMO + high stoke).
supply_signals: Used AK Phazer 90L listing indicates active secondary-market learner board turnover in UK (Bantham, Devon).
